caption: A person's hands are shown opening a trading card box on a black table in a studio setting. The person, wearing a light-colored shirt, is seen removing a single trading card protected by a plastic slab from a box labeled "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC." In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap sits behind the table. The scene is branded with "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" text and logos, which appear on the table surface and as an on-screen overlay along with a website address, "CASEBREAKS.COM." A small inset video in the upper right corner shows another perspective of the table. As the sequence progresses, the person lifts the card slab completely out of the box, holding it upright to display it. A "Topps" logo is visible on the box in the final frames.
